aboutUs: Rangras Kala Studio is an exclusive handmade art e-commerce platform offering a premium, Earthy Artisan Luxury experience. We specialize in custom artworks, traditional paintings, and personalized gift items crafted with passion and precision.
shippingPolicy: We offer standard and express shipping. Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, while express takes 2-3 business days. Free standard shipping on orders over ₹5000.
returnPolicy: Since our artworks are custom-made, we do not accept returns unless the item arrives damaged. If damaged, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery.

faqs.question: Do you accept custom orders?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept custom orders! You can reach out to us via the Contact Us page or direct message us.

faqs.question: How long does it take to make a custom portrait?
faqs.answer: Custom portraits typically take 2-3 weeks to complete depending on the complexity and medium.
